_note: Walmadjari spellings for non-symptom form answers. Used by rapidfuzz keyword matching against the rough STT transcript when language=0. Entries pulled from android/app/src/main/res/values-b+wmt/strings.xml; placeholder marker `(WMT)` in that file means the source string is not yet a real translation and we leave alternatives empty. ALL ENTRIES NEED COMMUNITY REVIEW before clinical use.
